title: Section 2
content: In this Act (a) "parliamentary constituency" has the same meaning as in the Representation of the People Act, 1950 (43 of 1950); (b) "sitting member" means a person who immediately before the commencement of this Act is a member of the House of the People; (c) "Union territory" means any of the Union territories of the Andaman and Nicobar Islands, 1 [Lakshadweep] and Dadra and Nagar Haveli.
footnote: 1. Subs. by the Laccadive, Minicoy and Aminidivi Islands (Alteration of Name) Adaptation of Laws Order, 1974 (w.e.f. 1-11-1973).
